ValidationRule.description: Determine if there are missing fields for stages 0 to 7 on PKi Sales Record Type
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
/*Legacy Opp-open=rules apply Legacy Opp-closed=rules not apply New Opp = rules apply*/
AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , OR( fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process" ,fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process For Dealers" ) , OR( AND( /*New opps-all stages*/ DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , fxStageNumber__c <=7 , fxStageNumber__c > fxStageNumberToAdvance__c ) , AND( /*legacy opps-open*/ DateValue(CreatedDate) < $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , fxStageNumber__c <=6 , fxStageNumber__c > fxStageNumberToAdvance__c , ISCHANGED(StageName) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_070: You are missing fields to advance to the stage selected. Review the section called "Fields to Complete" and fill in missing fields.
